headline: Fertilizer prices to remain high after Iran war as restart challenges expected, says Nutrien
summary: High fertilizerprices will remain for months and probably into 2027 regardlessof how soon the Iran war ends, the world's biggest potashproducer says. And despite high prices for all...

headline: Nutrien (NTR) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Nutrien (NTR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +6.99% and +12.87%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
